description: Broadcast a custom popup message to all active Emby sessions from the admin plugin page.
name: EmbyNotify
overview: Broadcast messages to all active Emby sessions.

versions.changelog: - feat: add notification history to plugin config page, style update section - chore: update manifest for v1.4.0 - fix: make notification store best-effort, fix session send and message format - chore: update manifest for v1.3.0 - feat: add deferred notification delivery with per-user tracking - chore: update manifest for v1.2.0 - feat: add self-update mechanism via GitHub Releases API - chore: add plugin manifest and auto-update workflow - v1.1.0: fix config page for Emby 4.9, add plugin logo - ci: add GitHub Actions release workflow
